title: Microcontroller Playground for Kids
tagline: A playful learning experience using ESP microcontrollers and an online Scratch-like programming tool
goal: Introduce children (age 10-12) to physical computing through playful experimentation.
concept: Create a low-barrier environment where kids can explore electronics using block-based programming, build their own circuits and experiment with interactive behaviors like lights, buttons, and sounds.
setup: Block-based programming environment generating ESP code
outcome: High engagement and rapid experimentation. Many kids quickly began trying out their own ideas.
